# US Bank routing + account negative corpus
# Invalid routing numbers, isolated routing, missing account, wrong format
routing: 021000020 account: 123456789012 (bad routing checksum)
account: 123456789012 (no routing number)
routing: 021000021 (no account number)
Phone: 021-000-021 x123456789
ZIP: 02100-0021
Order routing 021000020 ref 12345
routing 999999999 account 12345678 (bad checksum)
SSN 021-00-0021
IP address 021.000.021.123
Serial routing-021000021-unit
Reference 0210000210 (10 digits, too long)
Part number 021000021X account pending
routing: abcd account: 12345678 (non-digits)
Date 02/10/00021
Route 21 highway account 99
tracking: 021000021 order: 12345678901 (not bank context)
routing 000000000 account 123456789 (all zeros fails ABA)
rtn 021000021 (account too far away)
Lot number: 02100002 item: 123456789012
Model 021-000-021 version 12345678901
